bio:
Roxy has extensive experience in treat management, looking cute, and being a fox. She doesn't understand why these balls are made of wood. Stupid Hoomans.

"Just want to say Sascha is not a dog, she is a bear.  If I see her on my patch again I will mess her up"

[Check ma socials y'all: @FoxyRoxyDXB](http://instagram.com/foxyroxydxb)
